synonyms: Происходить, случаться - happen, occur, take place

examples.eng: The agreement came about after long negotiations.
examples.ru: Соглашение было достигнуто после долгих переговоров.

examples.eng: How did this situation come about?
I don't know how it came about.
examples.ru: Я не знаю, как это случилось.

examples.eng: These problems came about due to miscommunication.
How did all this come about?
How did genetic engineering come about?
Our ship came about to the harbour.
